changelog:
FAST v6 is a major upgrade with automatic updates.

Run the installer once to enroll - every future update applies silently in the background, no more SmartScreen warnings on each release.

Highlights since v5: FAST Benchmark v2 with GPU scoring, unified app with license-gated sections, 25H2 latency-regression debloat, NVIDIA voltage-cap fix for OC'd cards, expanded driver intelligence.
